hero.title: Bulletins, downloads, and parish documents in one place
hero.lede: Weekly newsletters and longer parish documents are gathered here so visitors can stay with the parish site when looking for recent updates or archived material.

intro.title: A clear home for weekly newsletters
intro.body: This page gives the parish a straightforward local archive for newsletters, synod papers, and other downloadable documents.
intro.asideBody: Upload a newsletter PDF in the CMS and it will appear here automatically.

cards.title: Most recent newsletter
paragraphs: The newest bulletin appears first so parishioners can reach it quickly.

cards.title: Newsletter Archive
paragraphs: Every uploaded bulletin is listed here automatically in date order.

cards.title: Parish Documents
paragraphs: Synod papers, prayer resources, and parish reports stay available alongside the newsletter archive.

cards.title: Prefer to ask the parish office
paragraphs: If someone needs help finding a bulletin or document, direct them to the parish office during the published office hours.
